prompt: We've got an existing Next.js app (it has a package.json with build/dev/test/lint scripts and a pnpm-lock.yaml, but no mise). Add our standard mise setup and tasks to it. Don't break anything that's already there.
assertions: mise.toml created, pins node and pnpm, no inline [tasks]
node tasks setup/lint/test/build/dev exist as files
every task file follows the contract
